description: Google Cloud Speech-to-Text converts audio into text using Google’s speech recognition models. It offers versioned APIs and related tooling for transcription and speech-recognition workflows.
summary: speech.googleapis.com exposes Google Cloud Speech-to-Text HTTP APIs for v1, v1p1beta1, and v2, plus gcloud CLI support documented for Speech-to-Text workflows; authentication is via Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access tokens or API keys for the HTTP APIs, and gcloud login for the CLI.

packages.runtimeHint: Install via gcloud SDK installers/Homebrew/snap as documented by Google Cloud SDK
